titles.en: The Initiation of Salat, Its Prohibitions and Dissolution
The Initiation of Salat, Its Prohibitions and Dissolution

segments: 68 - قَالَ أَمِيرُ اَلْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَلِيٌّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «اِفْتِتَاحُ اَلصَّلاَةِ اَلْوُضُوءُ وَ تَحْرِيمُهَا اَلتَّكْبِيرُ وَ تَحْلِيلُهَا اَلتَّسْلِيمُ.
arabic.text: 68 - قَالَ أَمِيرُ اَلْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَلِيٌّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «اِفْتِتَاحُ اَلصَّلاَةِ اَلْوُضُوءُ وَ تَحْرِيمُهَا اَلتَّكْبِيرُ وَ تَحْلِيلُهَا اَلتَّسْلِيمُ.

segments:
Hadith.68 - The Commander of the Faithful Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as), said:
"The initiation of prayer is purification (ablution), its prohibition is the takbir (saying 'Allahu Akbar'), and its permissibility is the Tasleem (saying 'Assalamu Alaikum')."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.68 - The Commander of the Faithful Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as), said:
"The initiation of prayer is purification (ablution), its prohibition is the takbir (saying 'Allahu Akbar'), and its permissibility is the Tasleem (saying 'Assalamu Alaikum')."
